meta.load_condition: Load when user intent includes a concrete production situation, implementation target, failure symptom, or review request.

scenarios.trigger: Animation stutters, drops frames, or feels sluggish.
scenarios.orientation: Open DevTools Performance panel, record during animation, identify the bottleneck phase (layout/paint/composite), check for forced synchronous layouts, reduce layout-triggering properties.

scenarios.trigger: Scroll-linked animation lags or jitters during scroll.
scenarios.orientation: Ensure scroll handlers are debounced or use passive listeners, animated properties are compositor-only, and ScrollTrigger refresh is called after layout changes.

scenarios.trigger: Animation drains battery or heats the device.
scenarios.orientation: Reduce continuous animations, use CSS animations where possible (browser can optimize), limit simultaneous animated targets, pause off-screen animations.
Check prefers-reduced-motion media query, provide static alternatives, ensure animation does not convey essential information alone, limit flashing to under 3 per second.
